title: Smoked Russian Bacon Hash
description: Charred, bouncy, post-workout Russian dish featuring streaky bacon, simmered to perfection. Keto-friendly and perfect for a quick meal after a workout.

ingredients.name: Streaky Bacon
ingredients.notes: Thick-cut, smoked bacon is essential for this dish.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced onion adds a sweet and savory flavor.

ingredients.name: Bell Pepper
ingredients.notes: Green bell pepper adds crunch and a bit of sweetness.

ingredients.name: Potato
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced potato adds heft and texture.

instructions: Heat an iron skillet over medium-high heat and cook the bacon until crispy.
Remove the crispy bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the sliced onion to the skillet.
Cook the onion until translucent and slightly caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced bell pepper to the skillet and cook for another 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the sliced potato to the skillet and cook for about 5 minutes, until slightly tender.
Return the crispy bacon to the skillet and stir to combine with the potatoes and vegetables.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Simmer the mixture for another 2-3 minutes, until the flavors have melded together and the potatoes are cooked through.
Use a smoking gun to add a smoky flavor to the dish, if desired.
